failedAssertions.reason: Compensation-change submission UX (and delta rendering) is missing from tested UI path.
Required budget impact metrics are not rendered on submitter or approver surfaces.
Dashboard surfaces non-VP-pending items, contrary to assertion requirement.
Rejection flow works, but required submitter notification UX was not observed.
Resubmit/edit UX for submitter after changes requested is missing.
Event-specific notification UX (bell/feed + submitter notifications) was not present.
Audit UI is chronological but incomplete versus contract (missing explicit actor identity and edit-history detail).
Self-approval is blocked functionally, but required disabled-button tooltip UX is not implemented as specified.
Budget impact preview is incomplete vs contract requirements (missing current spend / projected spend / utilization%).
Expected over-budget/over-headcount warnings and flagging were not present.
Required per-department committed/planned/remaining column breakdown was not present in the rendered vs Actual UI.
Cascade was incomplete: report managerId references remained pointed at the deleted manager ID instead of being reassigned/cleared.

appliedUpdates.description: Added planning milestone flow guidance for stale agent-browser refs, icon-only approval actions, and approval-chain Add Employee limitations with setup fallback strategy.
